title: pelargonium × victorianum
intro: Pelargonium × victorianum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Old Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and regulating menstrual cycles, among others. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × victorianum include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
